title: Pipelock Fleet Monitor

panels.title: Agents Online
panels.description: Pipelock instances being scraped

panels.title: Total Connections
panels.description: Cumulative CONNECT tunnels across fleet

panels.title: Data Transferred
panels.description: Total bytes through all tunnels

panels.title: Active Now
panels.description: Active tunnels (top) and tracked sessions

panels.title: Security Events
panels.description: Combined security events. 0 = all clear.

targets.expr: (sum(pipelock_kill_switch_denials_total{job!="pipelock-demo"}) or vector(0)) + (sum(pipelock_chain_detections_total{job!="pipelock-demo"}) or vector(0)) + (sum(pipelock_session_anomalies_total{job!="pipelock-demo"}) or vector(0)) + (sum(pipelock_session_escalations_total{job!="pipelock-demo"}) or vector(0)) + (sum(pipelock_scanner_hits_total{job!="pipelock-demo"}) or vector(0))

panels.title: Fleet Status
panels.description: Per-agent health, connections, data, avg tunnel duration

panels.title: Data Transfer Rate
panels.description: Bytes/sec through each agent's tunnels

panels.title: Total Data by Agent
panels.description: Cumulative bytes per agent since restart

panels.title: Connection Rate
panels.description: New tunnel connections per agent. Rejected = blocked by policy.

panels.title: Tunnel Duration Distribution
panels.description: How long tunnels stay open

panels.title: Scanner Hit Distribution
panels.description: Breakdown by scanner layer: blocklist, ssrf, dlp, injection, ratelimit, databudget. Shows which security rules are firing most.

panels.title: Security Events Over Time
panels.description: All security events stacked. Flat at 0 = healthy.

panels.title: WebSocket Connections
panels.description: WebSocket proxy connections per agent

panels.title: WebSocket Data
panels.description: WebSocket bytes by direction (inbound/outbound)

panels.title: WebSocket Frames & Active
panels.description: Frame types (text/binary/ping/pong) and active connection count

panels.title: Body DLP Hits
panels.description: DLP pattern matches in HTTP request bodies, by action (block/warn).

panels.title: Header DLP Hits
panels.description: DLP pattern matches in sensitive HTTP headers (Authorization, Cookie, X-Api-Key).

panels.title: DLP Hits by Agent
panels.description: Total body + header DLP hits per agent.

panels.title: CEE DLP Matches
panels.description: Cross-request DLP pattern matches. Detects secrets split across multiple requests.

panels.title: CEE Entropy Events
panels.description: Cross-request entropy threshold exceeded. High entropy across requests suggests encoded exfiltration.

panels.title: Fragment Buffer Memory
panels.description: Memory used by cross-request fragment reassembly buffers.

panels.title: TLS Intercept Rate
panels.description: TLS interception attempts by outcome (success/error).

panels.title: Cert Cache
panels.description: Dynamic TLS certificate cache entries.

panels.title: TLS Handshake Latency
panels.description: p50/p95/p99 TLS handshake duration.

panels.title: TLS Blocked (Req/Resp)
panels.description: Requests and responses blocked through intercepted TLS tunnels.

panels.title: SNI Match vs Mismatch
panels.description: SNI verification: match = healthy, mismatch = potential domain fronting or MITM.

panels.title: Scan API Requests by Kind
panels.description: Evaluation endpoint request rate broken down by scan kind.

panels.title: Scan API Errors & Findings
panels.description: Scan API error rate and finding rate.

panels.title: Total Scan API Requests
panels.description: Cumulative scan API requests across all kinds.

description: Production pipelock fleet monitoring. All 66 panels across 16 rows.
